overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing high-speed motorcycle driving through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The journey begins in a dense urban core with neon signs and overpasses, transitions through commercial districts with palm-lined avenues, and ends at the city edge with mountain views and dirt roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial avenue with overpass and palm trees

events.description: exits covered overpass with colorful murals into bright open sunlight
accelerates onto wide avenue lined with palm trees and modern buildings

agents.ego_description: riding a red futuristic motorcycle with decals, accelerating from under an overpass into sunlit urban streets

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same direction on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with colorful graffiti murals painted on the underside
tall palm trees lining the right side of the commercial avenue
multi-story commercial structures with modern facades and signage
distinctive wide yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with colorful ceiling murals, then emerges into bright morning sunlight. The motorcycle accelerates along a wide urban avenue lined with palm trees and modern commercial buildings, crossing distinctive yellow-striped pedestrian walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit urban canyon with overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: enters heavily shaded area between tall skyscrapers with reduced sunlight
neon advertisements and digital billboards become prominent on building facades

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban canyon with neon signage, weaving between tall buildings and under elevated walkways

notable_agents.action: dark sedan passing on the left side in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens including a prominent 'City Dreams' billboard
elevated pedestrian bridges connecting the tall buildings across the street
large corporate signage for Kendachi corporation suspended between buildings

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a dense urban canyon where tall buildings block much of the sunlight. Neon billboards and the prominent Kendachi corporate sign illuminate the shaded street as the rider passes under elevated pedestrian walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive digital advertising screens

events.description: emerges from building shadows back into direct sunlight
approaches intersection with suspended traffic signals and crosses yellow crosswalk

agents.ego_description: speeding through commercial area with large curved digital billboards, maintaining high speed through intersections

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: massive curved digital advertising displays showing product advertisements on building facades
suspended traffic signals and lighting gantries spanning the roadway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dense urban canyon, the motorcycle re-enters sunlight while passing massive curved digital billboards. The rider navigates through intersections with overhead traffic signals while sharing the road with moderate traffic including a blue sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway transitioning to open road with mountain views

events.description: exits dense urban core into less developed area with distant mountains becoming visible
maintains high speed on wide highway with clear sightlines and minimal traffic

agents.ego_description: racing along open highway with mountain ranges visible in the distance, passing modern commercial complexes on the left

notable_agents.action: green delivery truck driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large mountain formations visible on the horizon beyond the city limits
concrete noise reduction walls with greenery on top separating the highway
low-rise modern commercial buildings with extensive glass facades

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the motorcycle exits the dense city core onto a wide highway. Mountains become visible on the horizon to the right, while modern commercial complexes and sound barriers line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with distant city skyline and mountain backdrop

events.description: road becomes more isolated with desert vegetation and rocky terrain appearing on sides
passes futuristic spire tower structure visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along desert highway with mountains flanking both sides and the city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: arid landscape with scrub brush, rocks, and sparse desert vegetation
tall slender futuristic spire structure visible in the distance ahead
yellow and white metal safety barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The highway stretches through an arid landscape with mountains now visible on both sides. The terrain becomes more desert-like with scrub vegetation, while a distinctive futuristic tower rises in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural edge of city with unpaved roads and scattered pedestrians

events.description: road surface changes from paved asphalt to unpaved dirt road
slows down to navigate around pedestrians standing near the roadside

agents.ego_description: navigating onto dirt road at the city perimeter, slowing down as pedestrians appear near parked vehicles on the roadside

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing standing near a parked vehicle on the dirt shoulder

entered.detail: arid rocky terrain formations with sparse vegetation on the right side
derelict and parked vehicles scattered along the dirt roadside

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle transitions onto an unpaved dirt road at the city's edge, surrounded by rocky hills and desert terrain. The rider slows down to navigate around pedestrians standing near abandoned vehicles parked along the rural roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from a bright, palm-lined boulevard into a shaded corporate canyon before emerging back into the open city sunlight. It begins under a concrete overpass adorned with colorful murals, quickly accelerating into the morning light along a wide avenue of modern commercial buildings and yellow-striped pedestrian crossings. As the rider pushes forward, the environment shifts abruptly into a dense urban canyon where towering skyscrapers block the sun, leaving the street illuminated by neon billboards and a prominent Kendachi corporate sign. The scene then opens back up as the motorcycle exits the shadows, passing massive curved digital displays and navigating through busy intersections alongside other vehicles, including a blue sports car, under a clear sky.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from a structured urban highway into a rugged, arid wilderness. It begins as the motorcycle exits the dense city core onto a wide highway, where modern commercial complexes and sound barriers line the left while mountains first appear on the horizon. As the road stretches forward, the environment shifts into a desert-like landscape with scrub vegetation and mountains flanking both sides, leading the camera toward a distinctive futuristic tower rising in the distance. The scene then shifts from the smooth pavement to an unpaved dirt road at the city's edge, surrounded by rocky hills. Finally, the rider slows down to navigate through the rural terrain, passing pedestrians and abandoned vehicles parked along the dusty roadside.
